backend/main.mo: Actor providing authorization-gated user profile management and CRUD operations for recut projects using in-memory maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping feature requests to affected frontend files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Pre-generated summaries of all major frontend files describing their roles in styling, routing, components, recut features, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind layers and theme variables defining color tokens, dark mode values, and global styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point setting up the root container and loading the main frontend script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app configuring TanStack Router routes, theme provider, and global UI services.
frontend/src/components/AuthButton.tsx: Internet Identity login/logout button with status handling and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary that catches render errors and displays a fallback UI with reset capability.
frontend/src/components/InlineError.tsx: Inline error alert component with optional retry button for user-facing error messages.
frontend/src/components/NavBar.tsx: Top navigation bar with links, conditional project controls, and the Internet Identity auth button.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal prompting authenticated users without a profile to enter and save their name. Handles validation, saving via hooks, and shows toast feedback.
Displays a badge indicating saved, saving, or unsaved state with corresponding icons.
frontend/src/config/uploadLimits.ts: Defines max upload size and provides a helper to format byte sizes for display.
frontend/src/features/export/ExportPanel: UI panel for exporting recut parts as GLB files, handling export state and success/error toasts.
frontend/src/features/export/glbExport.t: Exports a THREE.Group as a GLB file using GLTFExporter and generates sanitized filenames.
frontend/src/features/recut/PlaneCutCont: Controls for adjusting cut plane angle, offset, and visibility settings with sliders and switches.
Performs a basic recut by cloning a mesh into two separated parts with distinct materials.
frontend/src/features/recut/RecutPreview: Three.js preview renderer that displays recut results, reference models, and helpers with orbit controls.
frontend/src/features/recut/recutTypes.t: Defines types and default state for cut plane parameters, part visibility, and helper display.
frontend/src/features/upload/ModelUpload: Panel for uploading GLB/GLTF/OBJ models with size validation, error handling, and retry support.
frontend/src/features/viewer/ModelLoader: Loads GLB, GLTF, or OBJ files into THREE scenes and extracts the first mesh as the original model.
frontend/src/features/viewer/ModelViewpo: Sets up a Three.js viewport with camera, lights, controls, resize handling, and loads/centers/scales a 3D model.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides context and hooks for managing Internet Identity login, stored identities, and authentication state.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching and mutating user profile and project data using the authenticated actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind base styles and a retro-themed design system with colors, outlines, and 3D viewport styling.
frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.tsx: App layout with navbar, routed content, footer, and a profile setup modal.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes React rendering with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard listing user projects with create, open, and delete actions, including confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/EditorPage.tsx: Loads a project, manages recut state and model processing, and provides UI for editing and saving recut settings.
frontend/src/pages/HelpPage.tsx: Displays a help guide with onboarding steps and a FAQ accordion for using the app.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Shows the marketing landing page with product overview, workflow steps, and navigation to create new projects.
frontend/src/pages/NewProjectPage.tsx: Provides a form and model upload flow to create a new project with default recut settings.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetailPage.tsx: Shows project metadata and recut settings with an option to open the project in the editor.
frontend/src/routes/RequireAuth.tsx: Guards routes by requiring Internet Identity login and displays a sign-in prompt if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides helpers to read URL params (including hash routing), persist them in sessionStorage, and remove them from the hash when needed.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: TailwindCSS config extending colors, typography, animations, and container settings with a retro-themed style and required plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks project state, versions, features, and architectural notes for a model recutting web app.
